scripts.dev:host: npm run dev:docker && npm run dev:app
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:docker: node scripts/ensure-env-docker.js && docker compose --env-file .env.docker up -d --wait mysql phpmyadmin
scripts.dev:seed: docker compose --env-file .env.docker exec api php artisan db:seed --force
